label: Irrigation Planner – Next Steps
description: Mappings that turn irrigation calculator outputs into concrete next actions, garden sessions, and stability updates across the Planning Graph.

nextSteps.label: Create garden irrigation sessions
nextSteps.description: Convert each scheduled irrigation event into a runnable garden session so the user can tap 'Now' on the garden page and immediately run the next irrigation block.

planningGraphEdges.notes: Irrigation events become domain=garden sessions that can be launched via 'Now' buttons and run inside the SessionRunner modal.

nextSteps.label: Update yield & stability expectations
nextSteps.description: Feed weekly water totals and stability signals into the Garden Yield Calculator so projected harvests can reflect over- or under-watering patterns.

planningGraphEdges.notes: Water availability and stability influence expected crop performance and harvest windows.

nextSteps.label: Flag soil moisture issues for amendment planning
nextSteps.description: When irrigation stability indicates chronic over- or under-watering, flag beds for soil structure or organic matter review in the Soil Amendment Calculator.

riskToFlagReason.high: Irrigation risk detected – consider improving soil structure, mulch, or organic matter to hold moisture more evenly.
riskToFlagReason.critical: Severe irrigation instability – soil may be compacted, poorly drained, or lacking organic matter. Review amendment plan.

planningGraphEdges.notes: Watering problems sometimes signal soil issues; this edge helps close the loop between water, soil, and plant health.

nextSteps.label: Align irrigation with storehouse & preservation goals
nextSteps.description: For beds linked to storehouse targets, surface reminders that consistent irrigation supports planned harvest volumes and preservation sessions (canning, dehydrating, freezing).

goalAnnotations.notesTemplate: This bed has storehouse targets. Maintain irrigation schedule to support planned harvest and preservation sessions.

planningGraphEdges.notes: Stable irrigation underpins reliable harvests for storehouse stocking plans.
Water consistency improves predictability of batch preservation sessions tied to harvest windows.

nextSteps.label: Next best irrigation actions
nextSteps.description: Provide simple, actionable suggestions (NBA) for the user based on current irrigation schedule and risk level: run the next session, adjust timing, or hold due to recent rain.

nbaRules.label: Consider skipping due to recent rain

then.message: Recent rain may have provided enough moisture. Check soil before running this irrigation session.

nbaRules.label: Shorten irrigation duration for this zone

then.message: Beds in this zone may be getting too much water. Reduce run time or shift to fewer days per week.

planningGraphEdges.notes: NBA rules decide when the garden 'Now' CTA should point to irrigation sessions vs. other garden tasks.
